subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! The Interlocutor attained, upon the Mount of mystic knowledge, unto the hearing of the divine Call, and this verily is that same Call which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز حق کلیم در طور عرفان باصغای ندای الهی فائز شد و این همان ندائیست که
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual foundations of true knowledge, @Mosaic imagery, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation
